summary_en: 160,000 shares (3.12% of S/O), ¥200M upper limit. Open-market acquisition. Period: 18 May–30 Sept 2026. Stated rationale: flexible capital allocation, shareholder returns, M&A applications.
title_en: Notice of Resolution on Matters Concerning Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Acquisition of Treasury Stock Based on Articles of Incorporation Pursuant to Article 165, Paragraph 2 of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief: Writeup Co., Ltd. (TSE Growth, Code 6580) announced on 15 May 2026 that its Board of Directors resolved to initiate a treasury stock acquisition programme. The company will acquire up to 160,000 shares (3.12% of issued shares outstanding, excluding treasury holdings) for a maximum aggregate consideration of ¥200 million. Acquisition will be conducted via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange from 18 May to 30 September 2026. The stated purposes are to enable flexible capital allocation in response to business conditions, facilitate shareholder returns, and support M&A activities. As of 14 May 2026, the company held 681,384 treasury shares against 5,124,616 issued shares outstanding (excluding treasury).
